case_title: PANFILO ARMAS VS. ELIZABETH ORTIZ RENTERIA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-27-2022 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO OCT-17-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PANFILO ARMAS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ELIZABETH ORTIZ RENTERIA IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. COURT VOIR DIRES PLAINTIFF AS TO PROPER JURISDICTION IN SAN FRANCISCO SUPERIOR COURT. COURT DETERMINES THAT THE MATTER IS NOT YET RIPE FOR TRIAL. NO EXHIBITS JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARMAS, PANFILO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ORTIZ RENTERIA, ELIZABETH $8,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,175.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,141.00 FILED BY ARMAS, PANFILO AS TO DEFENDANT ORTIZ RENTERIA, ELIZABETH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-15-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $100) SERVED MAY-13-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ORTIZ RENTERIA, ELIZABETH
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-15-2022 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUL-27-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER OF CONTINUANCE ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-18-2022 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PANFILO ARMAS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ELIZABETH ORTIZ RENTERIA IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
